description_long: This is a modern flat-screen television with a large, rectangular display and ultra-thin profile, supported by two minimalist V-shaped legs on either side. The front features a vibrant screen displaying a promotional image with various smart TV app icons, suggesting internet connectivity and smart features. The bezel is slim and black, giving the television a sleek and contemporary appearance. The back panel is mostly smooth with a few visible slots and a recessed area likely housing input/output ports and ventilation. The side views highlight the extremely thin design, with a slight bulge at the lower rear for internal components. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with a glass screen and metal supports.
description: A sleek, ultra-thin flat-screen smart television with a black bezel, supported by two minimalist legs and featuring a vibrant display. The back panel includes slots and a recessed area for ports.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a smooth black back panel with slots and a recessed area for ports and ventilation.
description_view_1: Left side profile emphasizing the ultra-thin design and the slight bulge at the lower rear for internal components.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the vibrant screen, slim black bezel, and two minimalist V-shaped legs.
description_view_3: Right side profile, similar to the left, highlighting the thinness and rear bulge.
attribute_bezel_design: Slim black plastic bezel, matte finish, minimalistic and modern styling.
